'''razuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poacevirus|poacevirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poacevirus|poacevirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| razuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzithith|ræzithith]] || [[word:ræzithij|ræzithij]] || [[word:ræzithish|ræzithish]] || [[word:ræzithi|ræzithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:razuzuthuth|razuzuthuth]] || [[word:razuzuthuj|razuzuthuj]] || [[word:razuzuthush|razuzuthush]] || [[word:razuzuthu|razuzuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:razuthuth|razuthuth]] || [[word:razuthuj|razuthuj]] || [[word:razuthush|razuthush]] || [[word:razuthu|razuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:razufthuth|razufthuth]] || [[word:razufthuj|razufthuj]] || [[word:razufthush|razufthush]] || [[word:razufthuf|razufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razuthuthu|razuthuthu]] || [[word:razuthuju|razuthuju]] || [[word:razuthushu|razuthushu]] || [[word:razuthuku|razuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razuthuth|razuthuth]] || [[word:razuthuj|razuthuj]] || [[word:razuthush|razuthush]] || [[word:razuthu|razuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razuthuthul|razuthuthul]] || [[word:razuthujul|razuthujul]] || [[word:razuthushul|razuthushul]] || [[word:razuthukul|razuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razuthuthuthu|razuthuthuthu]] || [[word:razuthujuju|razuthujuju]] || [[word:razuthushushu|razuthushushu]] || [[word:razuthuku|razuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razuthuthun|razuthuthun]] || [[word:razuthujun|razuthujun]] || [[word:razuthushun|razuthushun]] || [[word:razuthukun|razuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razuthuthuoro|razuthuthuoro]] || [[word:razuthujuoro|razuthujuoro]] || [[word:razuthushuoro|razuthushuoro]] || [[word:razuthukuoro|razuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
